suite.name: Uart Test

kw.name: Uart Clear
kw.doc: This Python function becomes a Robot Keyword!

test.name: Test UART Send And Read (Loopback)

kw.name: Uart Clear
kw.doc: This Python function becomes a Robot Keyword!

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Uart Send
kw.doc: This Python function becomes a Robot Keyword!

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Uart Read
kw.doc: This Python function becomes a Robot Keyword!

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.arg: msg=Failed! Did you connect the loopback wire?
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

test.doc: Sends a payload and verifies the identical payload is received via hardware loopback.

test.name: Test UART Buffer Clearing

kw.name: Uart Send
kw.doc: This Python function becomes a Robot Keyword!

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Uart Clear
kw.doc: This Python function becomes a Robot Keyword!

kw.name: Uart Read
kw.doc: This Python function becomes a Robot Keyword!

kw.name: Should Not Contain
kw.arg: msg=Clear command failed, old data was still in the buffer!
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` contains ``item`` one or more times.

test.doc: Ensures the clear command successfully drops old unread data.

test.name: Test Dynamic Baudrate Switching

kw.name: Uart Set Baudrate
kw.doc: This Python function becomes a Robot Keyword!

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Uart Clear
kw.doc: This Python function becomes a Robot Keyword!

kw.name: Uart Send
kw.doc: This Python function becomes a Robot Keyword!

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Uart Read
kw.doc: This Python function becomes a Robot Keyword!

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Uart Set Baudrate
kw.doc: This Python function becomes a Robot Keyword!

test.doc: Tests changing the baudrate on the fly.

suite.doc: Hardware-in-the-Loop Test Suite for UART Driver. REQUIREMENT: You MUST connect a jumper wire between PA11 (TX) and PA12 (RX) for Channel 2 Loopback testing!
